blocks.text: Quick heads-up before the weekend. Our mail and file server goes down for scheduled maintenance this Saturday, from early morning until roughly midday, so email will be unavailable and the shared drive will not mount while the work is underway. Nothing you send Friday will be lost; it simply will not move until the server is back. Please save and close anything on the shared drive before you leave Friday evening.

Daniel Valenzuela has been coordinating the window with our IT vendor and has the details, so send any questions about timing to him. If something genuinely cannot wait until Monday, reach Julie Hill by phone. Otherwise, plan on a quiet inbox for a few hours and enjoy the start of the long weekend.
